explanation: This command uses insertion (carets to escape characters) and reordering (standard syntax) to bypass the Sigma rule while maintaining the same behavior as the original command.
This command uses environment variable substitution and call syntax to obfuscate the use of the 'type' command, making it harder for the Sigma rule to detect.
